detail.title: Dec 2025 Product Innovation
detail.content:
Below are this month’s new Seller Center features and enhancements. Each section explains what the feature is, why it matters from an agency POV, and what actions to take with sellers. These updates are designed to help your agency better coach sellers, increase content output, reduce friction, and ultimately drive more GMV. --- # Shoppable Videos ## 🎥 **Image-to-Video Tool** ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/045d2a1653734a87bb16925352aaa076~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **📌 What it is:** A tool that automatically turns product images into shoppable videos. Sellers receive two video versions per creation and can retry with different images at no cost. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Enables faster content production for sellers with limited video resources * Increases shoppable video output without heavy creator reliance * Makes it easier to maintain consistent posting **⏩ Agency action:** Encourage sellers without regular video output to use Image-to-Video weekly. Test different image sets to identify higher-performing video styles. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?identity=1&role=1&knowledge_id=7203789379143437&from=feature_guide). --- # Working with Affiliates ## 🤝 **Sample Workflow Improvements**
**📌 What it is:** New auto-approval options for creator sample requests, allowing sellers to define criteria (e.g., GMV, posting rate) and automatically approve qualified creators. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Saves significant time managing sample requests * Accelerates creator content production * Improves creator experience and response times **⏩ Agency action:** Help sellers configure auto-approval rules Set quotas and price limits to manage inventory risk 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=442899025315639&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- # Promotions ## 🚀 **Smart Promotion Program** **📌 What it is:** A fully managed promotion program that uses Seller Center tools (coupons, subsidies) to improve product visibility and GMV. TikTok Shop manages promotion strategy and execution. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Reduces operational burden on agencies * Provides a turnkey way to test promotions * Increases visibility without manual setup **⏩ Agency action:** Identify eligible sellers (SPS ≥ 3.5). Recommend the program for sellers seeking hands-off promotion support. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=4827354015483691&course_type=1#EC2500CB). --- # Merchandising ## **🛍️ Product Opportunities**
**📌 What it is:** A discovery tool that surfaces trending products, keywords, hashtags, subcategories, and product themes on TikTok. Sellers can also match existing catalog items to trending demand signals to improve visibility and sales. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Helps you guide sellers toward higher-demand products * Supports better product naming, PDP optimization, and assortment strategy * Reduces guesswork when advising sellers on what to launch or promote next **⏩ Agency action:** Review Product Opportunities with sellers during assortment or growth planning. Use insights to recommend keyword updates, hero SKUs, or new product tests. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=4371484668528427&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- # Logistics & Fulfillment ## **🚚 Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT) Onboarding Experience** **📌 What it is:** An improved onboarding experience for new FBT sellers, including a redesigned Homepage and Analytics view that highlights logistics, traffic, and GMV impact, plus FBT vs. seller-fulfilled comparisons. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Makes FBT value clearer and easier to explain * Helps sellers understand logistics performance without deep analysis * Supports higher FBT adoption **⏩ Agency action:** Walk new sellers through the updated FBT dashboards. Use comparisons to recommend fulfillment strategy shifts. ## **📦 2025 FBT Storage Rate Card Update** **📌 What it is:** An update that keeps the 60-day free storage period and further reduces storage fees for inventory stored up to 270 days (14%–43% discounts). Rates beyond 270 days remain unchanged. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Lowers fulfillment costs for long-term inventory * Makes FBT more attractive for higher-SKU or seasonal sellers * Improves seller margins **⏩ Agency action:** Revisit inventory and storage strategy with sellers. Encourage sellers holding stock elsewhere to re-evaluate FBT. --- # TikTok Shop App Store ## **⭐ Loox App Launch** **📌 What it is:** A customer review app that syncs Shopify reviews (including photos) into TikTok Shop automatically and updates daily. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Strengthens PDP social proof * Improves shopper confidence and conversion * Keeps reviews consistent across Shopify and TikTok Shop **⏩ Agency action:** Recommend Loox to Shopify sellers. Ensure product IDs are correctly matched for sync. ---
